newsArray.title: Ravichandran Ashwin Joins Major League Cricket as First Capped Indian Player
newsArray.description: Ravichandran Ashwin is set to make history as the first capped Indian cricketer to play in Major League Cricket, signing with the San Francisco Unicorns for the 2026 season. With a wealth of international experience and a record of 765 wickets, Ashwin aims to lead his new team to victory while showcasing his skills in the American T20 league. This significant move marks a new chapter in his illustrious career, as he embraces the responsibility of being a trailblazer for Indian players in the league.
creator: narendra chaudhary

newsArray.title: MI head coach confirms: 'Bumrah is back with the squad' and ready for first game vs KKR
newsArray.description: Mumbai Indians welcome back star pacer Jasprit Bumrah for their IPL 2026 opener against KKR. However, key overseas players Mitchell Santner and Will Jacks are on an extended break. KKR's Shane Watson hopes to exploit MI's notorious slow start to the season, while MI looks for Suryakumar Yadav and Rohit Sharma to hit form.
creator: gaurav gupta
